info.name: iHub Chat
info.summary: Chat with AI about the documents you select in Nextcloud
info.description:
Adds a "Chat with iHub" action to Nextcloud Files. Selecting one or more documents and clicking the action opens an embedded iHub Apps chat window with the documents already attached.
This is the Nextcloud-side counterpart of the iHub "Nextcloud Embed" integration (Admin → Integrations → Nextcloud Embed). It contains no iHub server logic of its own — all document access goes through the user's existing per-user OAuth grant against the Nextcloud OAuth 2 server.
info.author: intrafind
